## Summary

- What changed and why:

## Validation

- [ ] `go test ./...` and relevant race/static checks
- [ ] Web tests/build if UI changed
- [ ] Installer/Compose tests if deployment changed
- [ ] Documentation and compatibility impact reviewed
- [ ] No credentials, private infrastructure data, generated builds, databases, or local `.env` files included

Security-sensitive fixes should first be reported privately through the link in `SECURITY.md`.
